title: ProgressBar
description: Determinate or indeterminate linear progress bar. Supports label, numeric value, colors, sizes and striped animation.

label.title: With label and value
label.desc: Combine a label above and showValue to display the numeric percentage.

indeterminate.title: Indeterminate
indeterminate.desc: Omit the value prop to show the sliding animation.

colors.title: Colors
colors.desc: Five semantic colors to reflect the process state.

sizes.title: Sizes
sizes.desc: Three thicknesses: small, medium (default) and large.

striped.title: Striped
striped.desc: Enable animated stripes for in-progress operations.

props.value: Current value between min and max. Omit for indeterminate mode.
props.showValue: Shows the numeric percentage next to the bar.
props.label: Optional label rendered above the bar.
props.ariaLabel: Accessible label when the label prop is omitted.
